Requirement: POST /auth returns a valid authentication token.
POST /booking creates a booking and echoes the submitted data.
GET /booking/{id} returns the previously created booking.
GET /booking returns the list of booking ids.
PUT /booking/{id} with a token fully updates a booking.
PATCH /booking/{id} with a token partially updates a booking.
DELETE /booking/{id} removes a booking; a later GET returns 404.
Updating a booking without a token is rejected with 403 (negative/security).
Booking responses conform to the documented JSON Schema contract.
GET /ping health check returns 201.
End-to-end checkout scenario expressed in Gherkin is confirmed.
A valid standard user can log in and reach the inventory page.
Invalid credentials (locked-out user / wrong password) show an explicit error.
Adding a product updates the cart badge and the cart contents.
Removing a product empties the cart badge.
Sorting products by price low-to-high orders them ascending.
A full checkout confirms the order and the displayed subtotal/tax/total are correct.
Checkout rejects a missing first name with a validation error.
Logging out returns the user to the login page.
Cart subtotal sums item prices and rejects negative inputs.
Sales tax is 8% of the subtotal, rounded half-up.
Cart total equals subtotal plus tax (supports custom rates).
JSON Schema validator accepts valid payloads and rejects invalid ones.
Booking data builder produces valid payloads with overridable fields.
